# VIGOR The Wellness Spa

> Las Vegas's premier destination for holistic wellness, located in Summerlin.

## About

VIGOR The Wellness Spa is a specialty wellness studio offering science-backed, non-invasive treatments that help clients recover, rejuvenate, and perform at their best. Located at 10300 W Charleston Blvd, Suite 17, Las Vegas, NV 89135.

Phone: 844-844-6758
Email: info@vigorlv.com
Website: https://vigorlv.com
Booking: https://vigorlv.com/booking

## Services

### Brain Mapping & Neuro-PT (SYMMETRY Neuro-Pathway Training®)
Optimize brain performance with qEEG brain mapping and neurofeedback therapy. Non-invasive, drug-free treatments that help with focus, stress, sleep, anxiety, ADHD, and cognitive enhancement. Uses real-time brainwave analysis to create personalized training protocols.

### GLYPTO Cryo Bodysculpting
Non-invasive fat reduction and body contouring using advanced cryotherapy technology. Targets stubborn fat areas including abdomen, love handles, thighs, and arms with zero downtime. Includes skin tightening and cellulite reduction benefits.

### Delight Spa Capsule Experience
Multi-sensory wellness pod combining infrared heat therapy, steam detox, ozone therapy, chromotherapy (color light therapy), and aromatherapy. Promotes deep relaxation, detoxification, pain relief, and total rejuvenation.

## Location

- Address: 10300 W Charleston Blvd, Suite 17, Las Vegas, NV 89135
- Area: Summerlin, Las Vegas
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM

## Booking

Appointments can be scheduled online at https://vigorlv.com/booking or by calling 844-844-6758.
